description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. This subtle hued floaters can also be worn as slip-on sandals with its removable back strap.UpperSuede straps over the forefoot and around the heel to lock the foot in placeVelcro closuresRemovable back strap that can be attached to the elasticated loops at the midfoot, to transform the sandal to a slip-onSuede footbed with printed brandingCurved toward the toe for protection of the forefootOutsoleTPR outsole with circular nubs and lugsBranding on the outsoleOutsole stitched to the upper for maximum durabilitysandal careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
